title: GameGenerationFailed
description: Emitted when ai-engine fails to generate a game payload.

correlation_id.description: Request correlation ID propagated from the originating HTTP request.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the event.

game_type.description: Type of educational game that failed generation.

error_type.description: Classifier for the failure: validation_error, upstream_timeout, upstream_error, prompt_policy_violation, unknown.

error_message.description: Human-readable error detail (safe to surface internally).

safety_block_reason.description: Populated when the failure was caused by a safety policy block.

upstream_service.description: The upstream service that failed, if applicable.
